name: WF-08-recipe Backfill All Playlist

nodes.name: Process Backfill Videos One by One

parameters.query:
={{ `WITH claimed AS (
  INSERT INTO video_log (video_id, playlist_id, processed, status, created_at, updated_at)
  VALUES (${$json.sql_video_id}, ${$json.sql_playlist_id}, false, 'processing', NOW(), NOW())
  ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO UPDATE SET
    processed = false,
    status = 'processing',
    error_details = NULL,
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE video_log.status = 'failed'
     OR (video_log.status = 'processing' AND video_log.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')
     OR EXISTS (
       SELECT 1
       FROM recipes r
       WHERE r.video_id = video_log.video_id
         AND (
           r.processed IS DISTINCT FROM true
           OR r.nextcloud_pdf_url IS NULL
           OR r.nextcloud_docx_url IS NULL
         )
     )
  RETURNING video_id
)
SELECT
  ${$json.sql_video_id}::text AS video_id,
  ${$json.sql_playlist_id}::text AS playlist_id,
  ${$json.sql_title}::text AS title,
  ${$json.sql_description}::text AS description,
  ${$json.sql_thumbnail}::text AS thumbnail,
  ${$json.sql_youtube_channel}::text AS youtube_channel,
  ${$json.sql_published_at}::text AS published_at,
  ${$json.sql_video_url}::text AS video_url,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM claimed) AS is_new;` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { videoId: $json.video_id, title: $json.title, description: $json.description, thumbnail: $json.thumbnail, youtubeChannel: $json.youtube_channel, publishedAt: $json.published_at } }}

parameters.query: ={{ `UPDATE video_log SET processed = true, status = 'completed', error_details = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE video_id = ${"'" + String($('Claim Backfill Video').item.json.video_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'"} RETURNING video_id, status;` }}

={{ `UPDATE video_log SET processed = false, status = 'failed', error_details = ${"'" + JSON.stringify($json.error || $json).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'"}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE video_id = ${"'" + String($('Claim Backfill Video').item.json.video_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'"} RETURNING video_id, status;` }}

main.node: Process Backfill Videos One by One

description: Manual admin backfill workflow. Fetches every page from the YouTube playlist, then processes videos sequentially with duplicate and incomplete-recipe protection.
